title: Doesn’t Do Much
summary: You’re a slacker, but you know a little about a lot of things.
tiers: Tier 3: Skill With Attacks or Improvise
Tier 6 Drawing on Life’s Experiences or Quick Wits
gm_intrusions: New situations are confounding and stressful. Past actions (or inactions) come back to haunt the character.
text: You’re a slacker, but you know a little about a lot of things.
